mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (sender_id, receiver_id, job_id, connection_id, content) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{jobId}, #{connectionId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id, receiver_id, job_id, connection_id, content, created_at, read_at FROM chat_messages WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_messages SET read_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND sender_id = #{otherUserId}
AND (job_id IS NULL OR job_id = #{jobId})
AND (connection_id IS NULL OR connection_id = #{connectionId})
AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT id, sender_id, receiver_id, job_id, connection_id, content, created_at, read_at FROM chat_messages WHERE ( (sender_id = #{user1} AND receiver_id = #{user2}) OR (sender_id = #{user2} AND receiver_id = #{user1}) )
AND (job_id IS NULL OR job_id = #{jobId})
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.other_id FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS other_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_at FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) t ORDER BY t.last_at DESC
